---
name: 🐞 Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

# 🐞 Bug Report – Help Us Fix It! 🧑‍🚀

## 🐛 What happened?

Clearly describe the bug.  
What did you try to do, and what went wrong?

---

## ✅ Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen instead?

---

## 🖥️ Environment

Please provide details:

- OS: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.1, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Browser (if applicable): (e.g., Chrome 123, Firefox 115)
- Node/Python/Other runtime version:  
- App version / Git commit hash:  
- Any other relevant environment details:

---

## 🔁 Steps to reproduce

Please provide a minimal and clear set of steps:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

---

## 📸 Screenshots or logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste error logs below.  
You can also attach files or GitHub Gists.

---

## 🙋 Want to help fix it?

- [ ] I want to try fixing it myself
- [ ] I can help test the fix
- [ ] I’m reporting but won’t be able to contribute

Let us know how you'd like to be involved!

---

## 🗒️ Additional context

Anything else we should know? Related issues?
